Flow.description: Automatically create the Invoice settings on account creation
Flow.label: Invoice Settings auto creation

start.filterFormula: OR( ISNEW(), {!$Record.Retrigger_Invoice_Settings__c} = true, AND( ISCHANGED({!$Record.Default_Invoice_Entity__c}), NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.Default_Invoice_Entity__c})) ), AND( ISCHANGED({!$Record.WFMContractID__c}), NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.WFMContractID__c})) ) )

textTemplates.name: txtEmailBody
textTemplates.text: New Invoice Settings have been created for the account "{!$Record.Name}". Please review the Invoice Settings prior to processing any timesheets to confirm that the information is correct.
